spec_match.rationale: Side-by-side :target vs :target-current correctly captures the spec's behavioural distinction.

interactive.rationale: Zero interactive markers — only fragment-link clicks and scroll. Invariant 7 fail.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises side-by-side; CSS-only rendering covers that.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show what happens when user clicks a link in the right column.

openQuestions.title: Add controls + live readouts
openQuestions.detail: Both columns should expose a readout showing what `:target` and `:target-current` resolve to. Plus a 'reset' button.

openQuestions.title: Click-then-scroll behaviour
openQuestions.detail: Click a link, then scroll past it — what happens to :target-current?

summary: Clearest framing of the spec difference but presented statically. Add live readouts and reset to make comparison real.
